case_title: HARRIS, DANIELLE et al VS LINN, HELENE et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LINN, SCOTT
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-14-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-04-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CASE CONTINUED. WILL NOT STIPULATE TO BE HEARD BY A PRO TEM OR COMMISSIONER GERALDINE ROSEN-PARK.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LINN, HELENE LINN, SCOTT KENSINGTON PROPERTIES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT HARRIS, DANIELLE FUETSCH, FRANZ JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLTFS ON DEFTS CLAIM FILED 10/3/05 ALLEGING DAMAGE TO HARDWOOD FLOORS AND STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
(PLTF'S CLAIMS CONT'D) TO BE PAID BY DEFENDANTS ABOVE-NAMED.
(DEFT'S JUDGMENT CONT'D) AND CARPETS WAS NOT NORMAL WEAR AND TEAR ATTRIBUTABLE TO REASONABLE AND ORDINARY USE.
JUDGEMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS FILED. COPY WAS GIVEN TO THE ACCOUNTING DIVISION.

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
(PLTFS CLAIMS CONT'D) AT $10/HR ($160-). PLTFS SHALL RECOVER THEIR SECURITY DEPOSIT ($2,800) LESS THE ABOVE-DEDUCTIONS ($540)-FOR A TOTAL OF $2,260
(DEFT'S CLAIMS CONT'D) DEFENDANTS SHALL TAKE NOTHING BY THEIR CROSS-CLAIM.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LINN, HELENE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-16-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-14-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 COMMISSIONER ROSEN-PARK RECUSES HERSELF FROM THIS CASE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARRIS, DANIELLE FUETSCH, FRANZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LINN, HELENE LINN, SCOTT KENSINGTON PROPERTIES $2,260.00 PRINCIPAL, $112.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,372.00, PLTF'S SECURITY DEPOSTI WAS $2800-DEFTS ISSUED A SECURITY DEPOSIT REFUND CHECK OF $355-. THE COURT FINDS THAT PLTFS ARE RESPONSIBLE FOR A BROKEN LIGHT FIXTURE IN THE KITCHEN($25), AND LABOR FOR 2 PEOPLE TO CLEAN THE HOUSE-16 HRS TOTAL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR
